mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROLE_MENU ( ROLE_ID , MENU_ID , REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{roleId} , #{menuId} , GETDATE() )
mapper.select:
SELECT RM.ROLE_ID, R.ROLE_NM, RM.MENU_ID, MN.MENU_NM, MN.MENU_URL, RM.REG_DT FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU MN ON RM.MENU_ID = MN.MENU_ID WHERE 1=1
AND R.ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MN.MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY RM.ROLE_ID ASC, RM.MENU_ID ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN ROLE R ON RM.ROLE_ID = R.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN MENU MN ON RM.MENU_ID = MN.MENU_ID WHERE 1=1
AND R.ROLE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND MN.MENU_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
SELECT RM.ROLE_ID, RM.MENU_ID, MN.MENU_NM, MN.MENU_URL, RM.REG_DT FROM ROLE_MENU RM INNER JOIN MENU MN ON RM.MENU_ID = MN.MENU_ID WHERE RM.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} ORDER BY MN.SORT_ORDER ASC
SELECT ROLE_ID, ROLE_NM FROM ROLE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ROLE_ID ASC
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_URL FROM MENU WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
